body_txt: Sometimes, the badass doesn't need a longcoat , or a motorcycle , or a pair of shades . Sometimes, you just need the right words. Maybe you're a badass who's part of an order of badasses with similar goals . Or maybe you're a lone badass, and you've come up with a credo that explains who you are to others. Either way, you've got a Badass Creed, that sums up everything you are and what you believe in. See also In the Name of the Moon . If it only gets said once, it's probably a Badass Boast instead. Saying it to reinforce your goal or similar can have the same effect as a Survival Mantra or a Theme Music Power-Up , and can precede or punctuate a Moment of Awesome . Often also a Faction Motto if used by a group. Not related to the guy from Black Cat , even though he is a badass Big Bad . Or the four-star badass General Ursakar E. Creed from Warhammer 40,000 . Or either of the championship boxers from the Rocky franchise.
